focus: Batch-audit the reconsolidation follow-ons, hook-state durability, post-insert enrichment, and playbook/manual-testing clusters left mostly UNVERIFIED after iteration 002.

graphEvents.detail: Ten hook-state and Claude stop-hook durability findings moved to SUPERSEDED by the HookStateSchema, .bad quarantine, and single-atomic-updateState autosave contract.
Seven post-insert enrichment findings moved to SUPERSEDED by the EnrichmentStatus/runEnrichmentStep pipeline plus retry-budget ledger primitives.
Six reconsolidation follow-on findings moved to SUPERSEDED by the current scope-filtered reconsolidation state machine and explicit conflict/complement abort statuses.

Four skill-graph query disclosure findings and three playbook/script-eval findings moved to SUPERSEDED; the former because query.ts now strips sourcePath/contentHash, the latter because the reviewed sk-doc runner/compiler scripts no longer exist on current main.
A four-finding skill-graph hardening attribution cluster remains UNVERIFIED because current guards exist but this iteration did not recover a concrete 016/017/018 addressing commit.
